text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: While I'm at the cafeteria having<n>lunch...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's the matter, Oguri?! It's<n>not like ya to
sigh durin' a meal...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well, apparently they're going to<n>model a plush
toy after me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...That's it? Sounds like good news to<n>me. Psh,
got me all worried for<n>nothin'.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No, it's too early to celebrate. They<n>just asked to
take my measurements<n>tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But... I don't know if I can do it...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Do wha—Oh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Bahaha! Skippin' meals for a day's<n>not gonna
change nothin'! Just go as<n>you are now!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: As I am now? Then...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Like that?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Like what?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm, what else is there? Oh, that's it.<n>Just give
me a moment.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well, what do you think? Didn't I get<n>changed
quickly?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Uh, I'm not sure what exactly's goin'<n>on...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Ding, dong...

text_block_list.name: Announcement
text_block_list.text:
The student-held Carrot Ranger show<n>will begin
shortly. All performers and<n>audience members,
please gather in<n>front of the outdoor stage.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah! That's it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa, easy there, Tiger! Where ya<n>goin'?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Please let me wear that costume!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I said no already! Pearl already<n>agreed to play
the baddie!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri! What da heck are ya doin'?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Please, Tama, help me out! Tell her I<n>need to
practice being a plushie!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Practice... bein' a plushie? Hold up,<n>Oguri. Don't
tell me...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya seriously mixed up fuzzy<n>costumes for fuzzy
plushies?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I... thought they needed my<n>measurements so I'd
fit inside...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya doink head! Da only thing goin'<n>into da plush
toy is cotton!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh. That's a relief. Then... that means<n>I don't
have to hold back for lunch!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Grrrooowl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So what if my clothes burst at the<n>seams? I'll
start off light with about...<n>thirty large rice bowls!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Th-that's way too much food...
